channel.title: Travelers Choice on Bali Kini
channel.description: Recent content in Travelers Choice on Bali Kini

item.title: Bali Named World's #1 Best Destination by TripAdvisor 2026
item.description:
Bali has made history on the global tourism stage. For the first time ever, the Island of the Gods has been crowned the world’s best travel destination by the TripAdvisor Travelers’ Choice Awards: Best of the Best Destinations 2026 — surpassing a lineup of iconic cities that have long dominated the list, including London, Dubai, Paris, and Rome.

This prestigious recognition is based on the analysis of millions of traveler reviews and ratings collected worldwide between October 1, 2024 and September 30, 2025, covering hotel stays, restaurant dining, and activities listed on the TripAdvisor platform.

item.title: Bali Raih #1 Destinasi Terbaik Dunia versi TripAdvisor 2026
item.description:
Bali menorehkan sejarah baru di kancah pariwisata global. Untuk pertama kalinya dalam sejarah, Pulau Dewata dinobatkan sebagai destinasi perjalanan terbaik di dunia oleh TripAdvisor Travelers’ Choice Awards: Best of the Best Destinations 2026 — melampaui deretan kota-kota ikonik yang selama ini mendominasi daftar, seperti London, Dubai, Paris, dan Roma.

Pengumuman bergengsi ini didasarkan pada analisis jutaan ulasan dan penilaian wisatawan dari seluruh dunia yang dikumpulkan dalam periode 1 Oktober 2024 hingga 30 September 2025, mencakup pengalaman menginap di hotel, makan di restoran, hingga aktivitas wisata yang terdaftar di platform TripAdvisor.
